name: 2027-01-15 Economic & Utility Reform TEST Dual Caption Short FB+IG+TH
description:
Saan napupunta ang ilaw?

Manila households pay roughly 7x more per kilowatt-hour than Auckland households. The bills are different. The grid is different. The ownership is different.

It is not perfect, no country is. The gap is structural.
